Notes: 13th Annual Roosevelt's Moravian Winter Classic Championship Game
Moravian's Danielle Brogan named Tournament MVP. Moravian's Ericka Blair &
Laura Jordan and Immaculata's Brittany Merkle named to All-Tournament Team.
Game.Officials: Fran Forenza,  Don McGettigan,  Robert Zanneo
